mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_info ( employee_id, attendance_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, attendance_status, late_min, early_leave_min, overtime_hours, remark, created_at ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkOutTime}, #{attendanceStatus}, #{lateMin}, #{earlyLeaveMin}, #{overtimeHours}, #{remark}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_info SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, attendance_date = #{attendanceDate}, check_in_time = #{checkInTime}, check_out_time = #{checkOutTime}, attendance_status = #{attendanceStatus}, late_min = #{lateMin}, early_leave_min = #{earlyLeaveMin}, overtime_hours = #{overtimeHours}, remark = #{remark} WHERE attendance_id = #{attendanceId}
mapper.select: SELECT attendance_id, employee_id, attendance_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, attendance_status, late_min, early_leave_min, overtime_hours, remark, created_at FROM attendance_info WHERE attendance_id = #{attendanceId}

SELECT a.attendance_id, a.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, a.attendance_date, a.check_in_time, a.check_out_time, a.attendance_status, a.late_min, a.early_leave_min, a.overtime_hours, a.remark, a.created_at FROM attendance_info a LEFT JOIN employee_info e ON a.employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE a.attendance_id = #{attendanceId}

SELECT attendance_id, employee_id, attendance_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, attendance_status, late_min, early_leave_min, overtime_hours, remark, created_at FROM attendance_info WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND attendance_date = #{attendanceDate}

SELECT a.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, #{month} AS report_month, COUNT(*) AS attendance_days, SUM(CASE WHEN a.attendance_status = 'normal' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normal_days, SUM(CASE WHEN a.attendance_status = 'late' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_count, SUM(a.late_min) AS total_late_min, SUM(CASE WHEN a.attendance_status = 'early_leave' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS early_leave_count, SUM(a.early_leave_min) AS total_early_leave_min, SUM(CASE WHEN a.attendance_status = 'absent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS absent_days, SUM(CASE WHEN a.attendance_status = 'leave' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leave_days, SUM(a.overtime_hours) AS total_overtime_hours FROM attendance_info a LEFT JOIN employee_info e ON a.employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE a.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND TO_CHAR(a.attendance_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{month} GROUP BY a.employee_id, e.name
